name: m2-contracts
description: M² / Monotonic Math — Solidity reference implementation (Hardhat v3)

scripts.test:unit: bash -c 'shopt -s nullglob; files=(test/unit/*.t.sol); if [ ${#files[@]} -eq 0 ]; then echo "(no unit tests yet)"; else hardhat test solidity "${files[@]}"; fi'
scripts.test:integration: bash -c 'shopt -s nullglob; files=(test/integration/*.t.sol); if [ ${#files[@]} -eq 0 ]; then echo "(no integration tests yet)"; else hardhat test solidity "${files[@]}"; fi'
scripts.test:invariant: bash -c 'shopt -s nullglob; files=(test/invariant/*.t.sol); if [ ${#files[@]} -eq 0 ]; then echo "(no invariant tests yet)"; else hardhat test solidity "${files[@]}"; fi'
scripts.test:invariant:full: M2_FUZZ_RUNS=10000 M2_INVARIANT_RUNS=100000 M2_INVARIANT_DEPTH=200 bash -c 'shopt -s nullglob; files=(test/invariant/*.t.sol); hardhat test solidity "${files[@]}"'
scripts.audit:slither: bash -c 'if command -v slither >/dev/null 2>&1; then slither . --config-file .slither.config.json; else echo "(slither not installed; run: pip install slither-analyzer)"; fi'
scripts.ci: npm run compile && npm run check:pragma && npm run check:hook-salt && npm run lint && npm run audit:bytecode && npm run audit:inheritance && npm run test:reference && npm run test:agreement && npm run test:local && npm run test:invariant
